validation.redactionBoundary: synthetic redacted approval packet validation preflight validator fixtures only; no private packet, raw account, credential, provider payload, order payload, execution, fill, or order confirmation content

promotionRules: preflight success allows only the pure local validator implementation
preflight success still does not create or read private approval evidence
preflight success does not create or read the private approval packet
preflight success does not import approval evidence
preflight success does not enable provider calls, runtime routes, DB migrations, public UI, or orders
